title: xlsx_spec
description: Canonical contract between skill methodology and office-plane execution. Frozen at v1.0. Vendored from spec 023 models-and-pitches/contracts/xlsx_spec.schema.json.

model_kind.description: Financial model type discriminator. 'custom' requires method='script'.

spec_version.description: Schema version. v1.0 frozen. Backward-incompatible changes require major version bump.

ticker.description: Primary company ticker. Canonical key per spec 021 FR-030.

title.description: Optional display title for the workbook.

peers.description: Peer tickers for comps analysis. Required when model_kind='comps'.

projection_years.description: Column header labels for projection periods (e.g., ['FY2026E', 'FY2027E']).

assumptions.description: Key financial assumptions driving the model.

operating_metrics.description: Per-company operating metrics for comps (revenue, growth, margins, EBITDA).

valuation_multiples.description: Per-company valuation multiples for comps (market_cap, ev, ev_revenue, ev_ebitda, pe_ratio).

sheets.description: Sheet definitions (for custom model_kind, used by method='script').

named_ranges.description: Named range to cell reference mappings.
